channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Harris will campaign in Texas to highlight state's abortion ban in a pitch to battleground voters
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris will head to reliably Republican Texas just 10 days before Election Day in an effort to refocus her campaign against former President Donald Trump on reproductive care, which Democrats see as a make-or-break issue this year.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: South Korea warns it can send arms to Ukraine after reports of North's troops in Russia
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — South Korea warned Tuesday it could consider supplying weapons to Ukraine in response to North Korea allegedly dispatching troops to Russia, as both North Korea and Russia denied the movements. NATO's secretary general said that would mark a “significant escalation.
item.dc:creator: HYUNG-JIN KIM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Missouri woman finds trunk full of stolen campaign signs with help of Apple AirTag
item.description: "I expected to find the AirTag, but not 59 signs. It was kind of like finding a dead body," the Missouri woman said.
item.dc:creator: Parker Padgett, Fox 5

item.title: GloRilla conquers self-doubt on her path to becoming one of hip-hop's most promising voices
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — GloRilla burst onto the hip-hop scene, lighting up the rap world a couple years ago with breakout tracks like “ Tomorrow ” and “ F.N.F. (Let’s Go) ” — even snagging a Grammy nomination. But as her name skyrocketed, so did the pressure.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The Capitol Christmas Tree is coming to Utah as part of its 4,000-mile trek -- Here's how it's staying alive
item.description: Here's what you should know about this year's Capitol Christmas Tree — and how the tree will be kept alive during its travels.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Court upholds freedom for woman whose conviction was overturned after 43 years behind bars
item.description: An appellate court in Missouri has ruled that a lower court was right when it decided to overturn the murder conviction of a woman who spent 43 years behind bars for a killing that her attorneys argue was committed by a discredited police officer.
item.dc:creator: Heather Hollingsworth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Judge tosses RNC challenge to Michigan voter roll maintenance
item.description: U.S. District Judge Jane Beckering ruled that neither the RNC nor two individual voters who joined the suit had legal standing to bring their case.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KREX 5

item.title: Former Abercrombie & Fitch chief Mike Jeffries arrested on federal sex trafficking charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO Mike Jeffries, his romantic partner and a third man were arrested Tuesday on charges of luring men into drug-laced, outlandish and coercive sex parties by dangling the promise of modeling for the retailer's once-defining beefcake ads.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ and CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump makes pitch for president to Latino voters at roundtable
item.description: "I just saw a poll that we're actually leading with Hispanics. That's never happened before," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Shafer, NewsNation

item.title: Biden heaps praise on Slovenia PM for aiding release of Americans in major US-Russia prisoner swap
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden heaped praise on Slovenian Prime Minister Robert Golob on Tuesday for his role in the recent seven-nation prisoner swap that freed Americans Evan Gershkovich, Alsu Kurmasheva and Paul Whelan from Russian prison. The deal, completed in August, was the largest U.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Richard N. Winfield, First Amendment lawyer and former AP counsel, dies at 91
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Richard N. Winfield, a leading U.S. First Amendment lawyer who represented The Associated Press for three decades and championed freedom of expression for journalists around the world, died on Tuesday. He was 91.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: LIST: Waffles, pancakes recall expanded over potential listeria contamination
item.description: The recalled products were sold under multiple brand names across the entire country, the company says.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: North Carolina county surrounding Asheville overcounted Helene deaths by as many as 30, sheriff says
item.description: A sheriff’s office statement and data from the state show that the North Carolina county that is home to Asheville overcounted deaths caused by Helene by as many as 30.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Judge orders Rudy Giuliani to hand over assets to Georgia election workers
item.description: The order appoints the election workers as receivers of Rudy Giuliani’s New York apartment, Mercedes-Benz, luxury watches and some of his cash, among other items.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Ohio man charged with bringing massive 'Trump' sign to Capitol for rioters to use as a weapon
item.description: An Ohio man has been arrested on charges that he brought a massive “Trump” sign to the U.S. Capitol and joined other rioters in using it as a weapon against police officers during a mob attack.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kunzelman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How third-party candidates could make a difference in swing states
item.description: Third-party candidates will be on the ballot in all of the top battleground states, drawing increased scrutiny over how they could influence the outcome of the presidential election in two weeks.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, NewsNation

item.title: Ohio deputies arrest of knife-wielding suspect in 'Scream' costume
item.description: Investigators said the man had separate outstanding warrants on charges of drug possession and attempted grand theft.
item.dc:creator: Justin Dennis, NewsNation

item.title: 19-year-old woman found dead in Walmart oven
item.description: A Walmart store in eastern Canada was closed for a third day Tuesday as police investigated the death of a woman whose body was found inside an oven. Halifax Nova Scotia Regional Police said in a release that they were called at 9:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Jocelina Joiner, KTLA 5

item.title: Truck stolen in Syracuse with father's ashes still inside
item.description: SYRACUSE, N.Y. (WSYR-TV) -- A North Carolina man is pleading for help after his truck was stolen in Syracuse over the weekend. But what was inside the truck was the most troubling to him.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Cafaro, NewsNation

item.title: Harris, Trump favorability ratings among lowest for nominees since 1956: Gallup
item.description: Former President Dwight D. Eisenhower received the best favorability rating in Gallup’s 1956 poll, with 84 percent supporting him.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Insurance company refuses to pay 82-year-old Las Vegas woman's claim after her home burned down
item.description: Two weeks before the fire, the insurance company canceled the woman's policy, accusing her of running a motorcycle repair shop out of her home — something the 82-year-old woman denies.
item.dc:creator: Kyle J. Paine, KRON4

item.title: Hurricane Oscar forms in the Caribbean
item.description: The formation of Oscar and Nadine comes as parts of the U.S. have been hit hard by a pair of hurricanes, Helene and Milton, that devastated communities, destroyed roads, caused power outages, took lives and injured many.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Meta again testing facial recognition software to fight 'celeb bait' scams
item.description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook and Instagram, is testing facial recognition software to combat “celeb bait” scams on its platforms as well as to allow users to more easily regain access to their accounts.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mike Jeffries, former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO, arrested on federal sex trafficking charges
item.description: Former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO Michael Jeffries and two other men have been arrested on sex trafficking and interstate prostitution charges, a spokesperson for federal prosecutors said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Asian American boba brand finds opportunity after Simu Liu sparks cultural appropriation debate
item.description: Olivia Chen and Pauline Ang, friends and business partners on boba milk tea brand Twrl, have tried three times to get on “Shark Tank,” the ABC reality show where up-and-coming entrepreneurs try to woo big-name backers.
item.dc:creator: TERRY TANG, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Hezbollah hiding more than $500M in gold, cash under hospital in Lebanon, IDF says
item.description: Israel on Monday said Hezbollah is hiding millions in gold and cash under a Lebanese hospital but will not target the building for attack.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eyewitness video captures frantic efforts to save lives after deadly collapse of dock walkway
item.description: SAVANNAH, Ga. (AP) — The metal gangway where dozens of people waited to board a ferry boat made a loud, creaking noise before snapping in the middle amid panicked cries from those sent plunging into the water.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM and EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Helicopter crashes into radio tower in Houston, killing 4
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Four people aboard a helicopter were killed when it crashed into a radio tower in Houston and burst into flames, officials said. The helicopter went down just before 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pinellas County man recovering after near-death experience with flesh-eating bacteria
item.description: A Pinellas County man is sharing his near death experience after contracting Vibrio Vulnificus, a flesh-eating bacteria. This comes as the Florida Department of Health is warning people to avoid floodwaters, as cases of the infection continue to rise after back-to-back hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Marino, WFLA, NBC

item.title: McDonald's says it doesn't endorse political candidates after Trump visit
item.description: McDonald's is emphasizing its political neutrality after former President Donald Trump spent some time behind the counter at one of its Pennsylvania locations.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, ABC 4

item.title: McDonald's says it doesn't endorse political candidates after Trump visit
item.description: McDonald's is emphasizing its political neutrality after former President Donald Trump spent some time behind the counter at one of its Pennsylvania locations.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, KRON4

item.title: White House proposes insurers cover cost of over-the-counter birth control
item.description: The White House on Monday announced a proposal that would require insurers to cover the cost of forms of contraception like over-the-counter birth control pills and condoms under the Affordable Care Act.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, ABC 4

item.title: What is pink cocaine?: The drug may be connected to Liam Payne's death
item.description: A partial autopsy conducted on former One Direction singer Liam Payne found multiple substances in his system when he fell to his death from the third-floor balcony of a hotel room in Argentina last week, according to a new report from ABC News.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Harris raises more than $220 million in September, outraising Trump 3-to-1
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris’s campaign raised nearly $222 million in September, raising more than three times as much as former President Donald Trump’s campaign.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oscar brings winds, heavy rains to eastern Cuba after striking the Bahamas
item.description: HAVANA (AP) — Tropical Storm Oscar brought heavy rains and winds to Cuba, an island already beleaguered by a massive power outage, late Sunday after brushing the Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Singer among victims in couple's alleged Las Vegas theft spree during Super Bowl week
item.description: A married couple allegedly stole hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of valuables as Las Vegas hosted the Super Bowl, with one theft involving singer Jason Derulo.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, ABC 4
